hero.headline: Bloom Into a Calmer You
hero.subheadline: Meet Blaze — your warm, wise AI fox companion. Together with guided courses, breathing exercises, and yoga, MindBloom is your cozy corner for mental wellness.

blaze.headline: Meet Blaze
blaze.description: Blaze is a warm-hearted fox who lives inside MindBloom, ready to listen, guide, and cheer you on. Whether you need a gentle nudge, a breathing reminder, or just someone to talk to — Blaze is always curled up and waiting.

traits.label: Always available
traits.detail: Day or night, Blaze is there for you.

traits.label: Judgment-free
traits.detail: Share anything. Blaze only ever responds with warmth.

traits.label: Personalized guidance
traits.detail: Blaze learns what you need and grows with you.

features.headline: Everything you need to feel good

items.title: Mini Courses
items.description: Bite-sized lessons on anxiety, sleep, confidence, and more — designed to fit into your real life.

items.title: Breathing Exercises
items.description: Guided breathwork to calm your nervous system in minutes. Box breathing, 4-7-8, and more.

items.title: Yoga Sessions
items.description: Gentle flows for all levels — from morning stretches to evening wind-downs.

items.title: AI Companion Blaze
items.description: Your personal fox guide who checks in, listens, and helps you stay on track.

items.title: Daily Check-ins
items.description: A quick daily ritual to track your mood and celebrate small wins.

items.quote: MindBloom changed how I start my mornings. Blaze always knows exactly what I need to hear.
items.author: Priya M.

items.quote: I've tried so many wellness apps. This one actually feels like it cares about me — not just my data.
items.author: Jordan T.

items.quote: The breathing exercises alone are worth it. I use them before every big meeting now.
items.author: Sam K.

cta.headline: Ready to bloom?
cta.subheadline: Download MindBloom free on Google Play and take the first step toward a calmer, warmer you.
